project.name: StoreMD
project.description: AI agent that monitors Shopify store health

pre-commit.command: cd backend && ruff check app/ tasks/ --select=E,F,W,S,B && cd ../frontend && npx eslint src/ --ext .ts,.tsx --max-warnings=0 && npx tsc --noEmit

rules: ALWAYS read CLAUDE.md and context.md before starting work
ALWAYS read the relevant docs/ file before implementing a feature
ALWAYS read the relevant .claude/skills/ SKILL.md before working on that domain
NEVER use HTTPException directly — use AppError with ErrorCode
NEVER store Shopify tokens in plaintext — always Fernet encrypt
NEVER create a DB table without RLS policy
NEVER commit directly to main — always use feature branches
ALWAYS include merchant_id in DB inserts for RLS
ALWAYS end DB migrations with NOTIFY pgrst, 'reload schema'
ALWAYS write tests for new scanners, endpoints, and services
ALWAYS verify plan access before executing paid features
